name: Inbox Assistant — BCC Feedback Loop

nodes.name: Fetch BCC Feedback Emails
nodes.notes: CONFIGURE: Replace YOUR_GMAIL_ADDRESS with your actual Gmail address. The +inbox-log alias does not need to be created — it works automatically with Gmail.

nodes.name: Write to Feedback Staging
nodes.notes: CONFIGURE: Update the path if your project is not in /home/jeroen/projects/inbox-assistant/

_readme: Import this workflow in n8n via Settings > Import Workflow. See n8n/README.md for setup instructions. This workflow monitors your BCC alias and routes sent email copies to the writing style corpus.
